C

city - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Station
The name of the city this station belongs to.
City - Class in com.transportapp.model
Represents a city within the transportation network.
City() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.City
Default constructor required for Jackson deserialization.
City(String, int, int, Station) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.City
Constructs a new City with the specified name, coordinates, and station.
com.transportapp - package com.transportapp
 
com.transportapp.generator - package com.transportapp.generator
 
com.transportapp.graph - package com.transportapp.graph
 
com.transportapp.gui - package com.transportapp.gui
 
com.transportapp.model - package com.transportapp.model
 
com.transportapp.routing - package com.transportapp.routing
 
compareTo(Path) - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.Path
 
containsNode(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.Graph
Checks if a node with the specified ID exists in the graph.
countryMap - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
A 2D array representing the country map where each cell holds the name of a city.
Criteria - Enum Class in com.transportapp.graph
Enum representing different optimization criteria for route finding in the transport network.
